headline: Latest News In Electric Vehicles - Onsemi and NIO Collaborate on Next-Gen EV Platform
summary: Onsemi and NIO are strengthening their strategic collaboration to facilitate the development of next-generation 900V electric vehicle platforms, incorporating onsemi's EliteSiC technology. This partnership aims to enhance vehicle efficiency, performance, and scalability, resulting in faster charging, longer range, and consistent acceleration for various NIO models, including those at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show. This expansion marks an evolution from their previous 400V systems, highlighting...

headline: ON Semiconductor Deepens Partnership With NIO on 900V EV Technology
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) has broadened its strategic partnership with NIO Inc. (NYSE:NIO) to support the rollout of next-generation 900V electric vehicle platforms, according to a company announcement.

content.title: ON Semiconductor Deepens Partnership With NIO on 900V EV Technology
content.summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) has broadened its strategic partnership with NIO Inc. (NYSE:NIO) to support the rollout of next-generation 900V electric vehicle platforms, according to a company announcement.

headline: onsemi and NIO Expand Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Next-Generation 900V EV Platforms
summary: EliteSiC technology enables faster charging, longer range and stronger performance across NIO’s latest EV platformsSummary onsemi is expanding its long-term collaboration with NIO to support the automaker’s transition to next-generation 900V electric vehicle platforms. The partnership leverages onsemi’s EliteSiC technology to improve efficiency, performance, and scalability across NIO’s latest EV lineup, including models debuting at the 2026 Beijing Auto Show. News Highlights EliteSiC technology
